CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Off Calendar

Unopposed Motion For Dismissal With Prejudice As To Plaintiff Chen Wang And Without Prejudice As To The Proposed Class; Declaration Of Robert Tauler
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: PLAINTIFF CHEN WANG Motion For Dismissal With Prejudice As To Plaintiff Chen Wang And Without Prejudice As To The Proposed Class.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's "unopposed motion to dismiss entire action" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
